programs.title: The Mindy Project
programs.desc: When Rob gives Mindy an opportunity to start her own practice in California, she struggles to tell Danny; Peter and Jeremy must come to terms with the fact that Lauren is moving to Texas.

programs.title: Mamma Mia!
programs.desc: Donna, an independent hotelier in the Greek islands, is preparing for her daughter's wedding with the help of two old friends. Meanwhile, Sophie, the spirited bride, has a plan. She secretly invites three men from her mother's past in hope of meeting her real father and having him escort her down the aisle on her big day.

programs.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programs.desc: When Coast Guard Adm. Frank Beardsley (Dennis Quaid) decides to move his family of eight children back to his old hometown, he encounters handbag designer Helen North (Rene Russo), an old flame from high school. Immediately, sparks fly between the two, and marriage is proposed. But Frank isn't the only one with kids to worry about -- Helen has a total of 10. Right away, the children have no intention of playing nicely, and together they decide to sabotage their parents' relationship.

programs.title: Superstore
programs.desc: A reporter (Eliza Coupe) is supposed to be writing a piece on the store, but focuses more on Jonah; Garrett tries to avoid being photographed; Cheyenne asks her boyfriend to write a corporate jingle.
